message:
🐛 Fix CI: add package-lock.json and use npm install (#4)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -23,7 +23,7 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Install dependencies
         working-directory: scripts
-        run: npm ci
+        run: npm install --no-audit
 
       - name: Build mission index
         run: node scripts/build-index.mjs

@@ -30,7 +30,7 @@ jobs:
         with:
           node-version: '20'
       - name: Install dependencies
-        run: cd scripts && npm ci
+        run: cd scripts && npm install --no-audit
       - name: Generate missions
         env:
           GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

@@ -17,7 +17,7 @@ jobs:
         with:
           node-version: '20'
       - name: Install dependencies
-        run: cd scripts && npm ci
+        run: cd scripts && npm install --no-audit
       - name: Find changed mission files
         id: changed
         run: |

@@ -13,7 +13,7 @@ jobs:
         with:
           node-version: '20'
       - name: Install dependencies
-        run: cd scripts && npm ci
+        run: cd scripts && npm install --no-audit
       - name: Find changed files
         id: changed
         run: |
